sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check if agent moved back
before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
after_seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']

print("Before LEFT:")
for n in before_seg:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['id'] == 6:
        print(f"  Agent: boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("After LEFT:")
for n in after_seg:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['id'] == 6:
        print(f"  Agent: boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check the animation frames to understand movement
if last_animation:
    for entry in last_animation:
        print(f"\nAction: {entry['action']}")
        for fi, f in enumerate(entry['frames']):
            seg_f = f.segmentation['nodes']
            for n in seg_f:
                if n['color'] == 'b' and n['id'] == 6:
                    print(f"  Frame {fi}: boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
